sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: now the downsides: health claims are usually exaggerated because the item tends to be oversold way beyond what it deserves. easy to overrate or misuse because this category attracts strong marketing and habits. better replacements often exist because that practical comparison matters.

closing.summary: Apple Cider Vinegar does have a few real-world upsides. but the nutrition case is still weak and the downsides drag it down hard. best treated as an occasional context item, not a nutritional base.
